The equilibrium occurs when growth matches harvest so the population stays steady
With r equal to 0.1 and K at 1000 the constant harvest part is 10
The sine term averages to zero over a full year so we ignore it for the mean
Solving the algebraic equation yields a stable positive value for P_e
As K drops linearly the equilibrium shrinks until it hits zero at t equals 333.33
Beyond this point the population cannot survive the environmental pressure
